use_cases: Displaying user profile pictures in navigation headers
Showing user avatars in comment sections or discussion threads
Representing users in chat or messaging interfaces
Displaying user thumbnails in user lists or directories
Providing fallback initials when user images fail to load
ai_summary: A flexible avatar component built on Radix UI primitives with configurable sizes (xs to 2xl), rounded styling, and optional tooltip support. Features standard image and fallback subcomponents for graceful degradation when images are unavailable. Clean, minimalist design suitable for any application requiring user representation.
